narrative:
Rocky River City Sd city school district has 16,628 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.7% D−R vs +2.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
